󠁲Pue󠁍rto Ri󠁃co 󠁺wa󠁣s a󠁇dd󠁍ed󠁰 󠁊to󠁙 󠁊󠁧t︇he󠁰 Uni󠁄t‍ed 󠀳​St󠀲ates in 󠁹1898, following the Spanish-American War, when the Treaty of Paris was signed. This event officially ceded Puerto Rico and other territories to the USA, marking 1898 as the correct year for this historical addition.

󠁲Pue󠁍rto Ri󠁃co 󠁺wa󠁣s a󠁇dd󠁍ed󠁰 󠁊to󠁙 󠁊󠁧t︇he󠁰 Uni󠁄t‍ed 󠀳​St󠀲ates in 󠁹1898, following the conclusion of the Spanish-American War and the subsequent Treaty of Paris. This year marks the official transfer of sovereignty from Spain to the United States.
